title: Tiny parasites, big problems - Prevent and cure with Vitalvet
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Although some critters are...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Although some critters are small in size, such as ticks and fleas, they can cause big problems for your pets.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Although some critters are small in size, such as ticks and fleas, they can cause big problems for your pets."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pet owners may trust Vitalvet Mossel Bay to provide the correct advice and recommend the appropriate treatment for pets for the prevention of infestations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Situated on the corner of Spring and Church streets, Vitalvet Mossel Bay has everything you need at one practice - truly a one-stop shop!","html":"Situated on the corner of Spring and Church streets, Vitalvet Mossel Bay has everything you need at one practice - truly a one-stop shop!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other services offered at Vitalvet Mossel Bay include sterilisations, vaccinations, microchipping, consultations, dentistry, ?soft tissue surgery and general health checks.","html":"Other services offered at Vitalvet Mossel Bay include sterilisations, vaccinations, microchipping, consultations, dentistry, ?soft tissue surgery and general health checks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Equipped with an on-site theatre and in-house laboratory, you, the pet owner, are sure to receive the best care for your animals.","html":"Equipped with an on-site theatre and in-house laboratory, you, the pet owner, are sure to receive the best care for your animals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Going into summer, Vitalvet Mossel Bay has all you need for a safe and fun season with your pets.","html":"Going into summer, Vitalvet Mossel Bay has all you need for a safe and fun season with your pets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Johann Rauch","html":"Dr Johann Rauch"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge","html":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Renee Perold","html":"Dr Renee Perold"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
